CustomField.description: True for logins by non-member accounts so the Member Logins Per Month report can exclude them. Staff and the integration user all use @smi.org / @spokanemountaineers.org / @prolocity.com usernames (members use a .smi-suffixed personal email); the FirstName/LastName "test" checks cover test member accounts. Formulas can't span User to Profile, so this keys off the username domain instead.
CustomField.formula: OR( ISBLANK(User__c), CONTAINS(LOWER(User__r.Username), "@smi.org"), CONTAINS(LOWER(User__r.Username), "@spokanemountaineers.org"), CONTAINS(LOWER(User__r.Username), "@prolocity.com"), BEGINS(LOWER(User__r.FirstName), "test"), BEGINS(LOWER(User__r.LastName), "test") )
CustomField.label: Exclude From Member Login Stats
